title: ACWA Power and SEFE Partner to Deliver 200,000 Tonnes of Green Hydrogen annually to Germany and Europe
content: ACWA Power, a Saudi-listed company and the world's largest private water desalination company, a pioneer in green hydrogen, and a leader in energy transition, has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the German company SEFE Securing Energy for Europe. The collaboration aims to produce and supply green hydrogen to Europe, marking a pivotal step in strengthening energy cooperation between Saudi Arabia and Germany.
author: Analysts Account
